codeReview.summary: The feature adds token header/chart UX, loading/empty states, and time-range switching, but it does not satisfy the required 24h change behavior because the value is hardcoded to 0%.

issues.description: 24h change is hardcoded to `0` when market data exists (`change24h` computed on lines 28-33), so the UI never reflects real positive/negative 24h movement and can never show a true red negative state.

`LightweightChart` takes `containerRef` but discards it (`containerRef: _externalRef`), while the parent still creates/passes a ref only for this prop. This dead prop/ref path adds avoidable complexity.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission API docs and actual API/types disagree on `/market` shape; docs claim `change24h`, but code exposes only `lastPrice` and `volume24h`. This mismatch likely drove the hardcoded 0% workaround.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/maxmohammadi/.factory/missions/79476079-9b4c-40cb-b69e-9e85801c6056/AGENTS.md:77 includes `change24h`; /Users/maxmohammadi/cash-orderbook/shared/src/index.ts:98-109 MarketInfo has no `change24h`; /Users/maxmohammadi/cash-orderbook/api/src/routes/market.ts:4 documents only lastPrice/volume24h.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill registration/discovery appears inconsistent: the worker could not invoke `frontend-ui-worker` via Skill tool despite the skill file being present.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/maxmohammadi/.factory/missions/79476079-9b4c-40cb-b69e-9e85801c6056/worker-transcripts.jsonl line 40 contains `Error: Skill "frontend-ui-worker" not found` and later notes `.factory/skills/frontend-ui-worker/SKILL.md` exists.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature commit scope drifted beyond `web/` by including shared-state `.factory` file edits, which conflicts with mission/skill boundaries and can muddy feature-only review history.

summary: Review failed: core chart functionality is present, but required 24h change behavior is not implemented correctly because the displayed percentage is synthetic and fixed at 0%.
